1.1 Parkinson’s Disease
1

1.1 Parkinson’s Disease
REQUIP® is indicated for the treatment of Parkinson’s disease.
1.2 Restless Legs Syndrome
REQUIP is indicated for the treatment of moderate-to-severe primary Restless Legs Syndrome
(RLS).

Parkinson’s Disease: REQUIP is indicated for the treatment of the signs and symptoms of
idiopathic Parkinson’s disease.
The effectiveness of REQUIP was demonstrated in randomized, controlled trials in patients
with early Parkinson’s disease who were not receiving concomitant L-dopa therapy as well a...
